title: The SyLo Texture Pack

# THE TEXTURE PACK USED BY SYLO ON YOUTUBE.
### **THE MOD CONTAINS:**
##                 **GUI CHANGES!**
##                 **ITEM CHANGES!**
##                 **MOB CHANGES!**
##                 **UI CHANGES!**
##                 **AND MORE!!!**

### THANK YOU FOR CHECKING OUT THIS TEXTURE PACK
                                                    -SyLo
![A picture of my skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a9c38692fb27b86b548959f62a495bc06817740.png)

# UPDATED TO 26.1:
1. Retextures some of the baby mobs, making them wear the hoodie + pants combo
2. Retextures some old texture from the datapack
3. Retextures more tools!
4. Fixed Elytra not getting retextured
